common.drag_hint: Drag tables or views from the left to open here
common.export_no_data: No data to export. Run a SELECT query first.
common.ready_hint: Run a query to see results
common.output_console_connected: [info] Connected to database. Ready for queries.

settingsPage.title: Settings
settingsPage.subtitle: Manage your account settings and preferences

profile.page_desc: Manage your personal information and profile settings

sessions.page_desc: Manage your active sessions and logout from other devices
sessions.dialog_desc: Are you sure you want to logout this device? This action cannot be undone.

password.page_desc: Set a new password. You will be logged out from all devices after the change.
password.email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address
password.old_format: Password must be at least 8 characters and contain both letters and numbers
password.new_format: Password must be at least 8 characters and contain both letters and numbers
password.new_different: New password must be different from current password
password.success_toast: Password reset successfully! You will be logged out from all devices.
password.login_again_toast: Please log in again with your new password
password.hint_length: At least 8 characters, letters and numbers
password.security_notice_desc: After changing your password, you will be automatically logged out from all devices for security reasons. Please log in again with your new password.

ai.title: AI Assistant
ai.placeholder: Type a message, / commands, @ select database objects, Tab model, Shift+Tab mode
ai.placeholder_mention: Type @ to drill down and select a database object
ai.mention_error_load: Load failed. Please connect this data source in Explorer first.
ai.plan.executeMessage: Please execute the plan above. Use todoWrite to create a todo list for progress tracking first, then execute each step sequentially.
ai.plan.continueMessage: I have additional requirements for this plan.

askUserQuestion.label: Question
askUserQuestion.rejectMessage: User declined to answer your question. Please review the current context to see if there is sufficient information to answer the question or reconsider the user's needs.
askUserQuestion.answerPrefix: The user has answered your clarification question(s):
askUserQuestion.continueSuffix: Continue with the current task based on the answers above. Ask again only if the information is still insufficient.
askUserQuestion.originalQuestionPrefix: To retain context, the original question(s) you asked the user are below:

compact.noConversation: Start or load a saved conversation before compacting.
compact.inProgress: Wait for the current response to finish before compacting the conversation.
compact.done: Conversation compacted. Previous usage: ~{{before}} tokens. Current usage: ~{{after}} tokens. Kept recent: {{kept}}.

exportFile.label: Exported file
exportFile.truncatedHint: Preview is truncated. Download the file for full data.
exportFile.fileIdMissing: File id is missing. Please re-run export.

writeExecutionConfirm.label: Write Confirmation Required
writeExecutionConfirm.labelAction: The following SQL will be executed
writeExecutionConfirm.executeOnceHint: Allow this run only and do not save a rule.
writeExecutionConfirm.rejectInputHint: Type a rejection reason and press Enter.
writeExecutionConfirm.approveFailedMessage: I intended to confirm the write, but the confirmation request failed. Please explain the error.
writeExecutionConfirm.rejectMessage: I do not approve this write operation. Do not execute the SQL.
writeExecutionConfirm.retryMessage: I confirm this write. Please call executeNonSelectSql again with the exact same SQL.
writeExecutionConfirm.retryWithGrantMessage: I confirm this write. Also set {{scope}} at the {{preset}} level to allow writes by default, then call executeNonSelectSql again with the exact same SQL.
writeExecutionConfirm.warning: This operation may be irreversible. Review carefully before confirming.
writeExecutionConfirm.inputPlaceholder: Type a rejection reason and press Enter
writeExecutionConfirm.cancelWithInputMessage:
**Write Operation Cancelled**

- **Status:** Rejected
- **User Feedback:** {{info}}

Please reconsider your plan or adjust the SQL based on the user's feedback.

permission.title: Permissions
permission.shortcutHint: Arrow keys move, Space toggles enabled, Shift+Space deletes.
permission.empty: No permission rules configured for this scope.
permission.summaryAllow: Default allow {{scope}} to run writes on {{target}}

explorer.title: Database Explorer
explorer.create_table_need_columns: At least one column is required
explorer.create_table_invalid_name: Table name can only contain letters, numbers, and underscores, and cannot start with a number
explorer.create_table_invalid_column: Column name "{{name}}" is invalid, can only contain letters, numbers, and underscores
explorer.transpose_readonly: Transpose view is read-only and does not support sorting, insert, or delete.
explorer.delete_row_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete the selected row(s)? This cannot be undone.
explorer.delete_row_force_continue: Do you want to continue and delete all matched rows?
explorer.select_row_to_delete: Please select a row to delete first
explorer.view_readonly: Views are read-only and do not support add/delete rows
explorer.delete_table_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete table "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
explorer.delete_view_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete view "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
explorer.delete_function_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete function "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
explorer.delete_procedure_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete procedure "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
explorer.delete_trigger_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete trigger "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
explorer.delete_all_in_folder_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete all {{count}} objects in "{{name}}" folder? This action cannot be undone.
explorer.delete_folder_success: Successfully deleted all objects in folder
explorer.delete_folder_failed: Failed to delete objects in folder
explorer.delete_database_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete database "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

connections.select_db_type_desc: Choose the type of data source to connect
connections.name: Connection name
connections.delete_confirm_desc: Are you sure you want to delete this connection? This cannot be undone.

settings.reset_confirm: Reset all preferences to their defaults?
settings.result_multi: Open new Result tab for each execution
settings.result_overwrite: Always overwrite the active Result tab
settings.console_new: Open a new console for each table

permissionsPage.title: Permissions
permissionsPage.subtitle: Review the default write permissions your AI workflows can reuse, and create or retire rules without waiting for a confirmation card.
permissionsPage.context_active: Showing rules that apply in conversation #{{id}}, including account-wide defaults.
permissionsPage.context_inactive: Showing account-wide rules only. Conversation-specific rules are hidden.
permissionsPage.open_from_chat_hint: Open this page from an AI conversation to create conversation-scoped rules.
permissionsPage.filters_desc: Narrow the visible rules by connection, coverage, or status.
permissionsPage.search_placeholder: Search connection, database, schema, or summary
permissionsPage.list_desc: These rules are matched before the assistant asks you to approve a write.
permissionsPage.empty_title: No rules match the current view
permissionsPage.empty_desc: Try clearing filters or add a new rule for the selected scope.
permissionsPage.create_desc: Define the default scope and target the assistant may write to.
permissionsPage.edit_desc: Update the rule definition. Changing its scope or target replaces the original rule.
permissionsPage.exact_hint: Most specific. Requires both database and schema.
permissionsPage.database_hint: Applies to all schemas inside one database.
permissionsPage.connection_hint: Applies to every database and schema in this connection.
permissionsPage.validation_database: Database is required for the selected coverage.
permissionsPage.validation_schema: Schema is required for the selected coverage.
permissionsPage.save_failed: Failed to save the permission rule.
permissionsPage.toggle_failed: Failed to update the rule status.
permissionsPage.delete_failed: Failed to delete the permission rule.

auth.login_desc: Enter your email and password to access your account
auth.sign_up_desc: Create a new account to get started
auth.password_min_length: Password must be at least 6 characters long.
auth.register_success: Account created successfully! You can now sign in.
auth.login_failed: Login failed. Please check your credentials.

error.not_login: You are not logged in. Please sign in and try again.
error.no_auth: You do not have permission to perform this action.
error.validation: Some fields are invalid. Please check your input and try again.
error.db_connection: Database connection issue. Please try again later.
error.system: Server is busy now. Please try again later.
error.http_400: Request is invalid. Please check your input.
error.http_401: Authentication failed. Please sign in again.
error.http_403: You are not allowed to perform this action.
error.http_500: Server error. Please try again later.
error.network: Request did not reach the server. Check whether the backend or dev proxy is available.
error.timeout: Request timed out. The backend may be unavailable or too slow to respond.
error.context_not_provided: useAIAssistantContext must be used within AIAssistantProvider

memoryPage.page_desc: Browse, filter, and edit saved memories.
memoryPage.list_desc: Review memories here and open any record for editing.
memoryPage.control_center_desc: Use filters to find memories quickly.
memoryPage.section_filters_desc: Filter memories by keyword, type, scope, and enabled state.
memoryPage.review_queue_hint: Review queue prioritizes memories that still need confirmation.
memoryPage.empty: No memories matched the current filters.
memoryPage.detail_new_desc: Write a new memory record that can be injected into future agent runs.
memoryPage.detail_edit_desc: Adjust metadata, content, and availability for the selected memory.
memoryPage.detail_empty_desc: Select a memory from the inventory or create a new one to inspect and edit its fields.
memoryPage.mark_needs_review_failed: Failed to update memory review state
memoryPage.delete_confirm: Delete this memory permanently? This cannot be undone.
memoryPage.search_desc: Enter a sentence to find the most semantically related memories.
memoryPage.search_placeholder: Describe the memory you want to recall...
memoryPage.validation_invalid_sub_type: Memory sub type must match the selected memory type
memoryPage.validation_conversation: Conversation ID must be a valid number
memoryPage.validation_manual_workspace_scope: Workspace memories are created by the system and cannot be added manually
memoryPage.maintenance_desc: Review memory availability and run cleanup when needed.
